About me

I study how businesses lose time, then build the system that gets it back.

Santhosh L
AI Automation Freelancer · Chennai, India
n8nPythonSQLJavaML

I graduated with a B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science from Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College (CGPA 7.81), after an earlier diploma in Mechanical Engineering — a path that taught me to think in systems long before I touched a workflow builder.

As a Power Apps Intern at Qruize Technologies, I built internal business apps and Power BI dashboards, and saw first-hand how much time teams lose re-entering the same data across different tools.

That's the problem I now solve full-time: I design n8n automations that connect AI agents, spreadsheets, and messaging platforms, so the handoffs that used to take a person an hour happen automatically, every time.

HTML / CSSAI AutomationOpenCVStreamlitPower BI
Services

What I can automate for your business

Every workflow is built around one goal — remove the manual step between your business and your customer.

🤖

AI agent workflows

Custom AI agents in n8n that read, reason, and act — replying to messages, qualifying leads, and updating your records on their own.

📲

Social media automation

Auto-publish images, carousels, and videos to Instagram and Facebook straight from a content sheet — no manual uploading, ever.

💬

Chatbot & DM automation

Telegram and Instagram bots that hold real conversations using AI models, backed by memory and your own business data.

📄

Document & resume scoring

AI-driven ATS scoring pipelines that read PDFs, extract structured data, and route results into sheets and email automatically.

🔗

System integrations

Connect Google Sheets, Gmail, Drive, and your favourite AI models into a single pipeline that keeps every tool in sync.

📊

Reporting dashboards

Power BI and Power Apps dashboards that turn raw business data into decisions, updated automatically as new data arrives.

Automation projects

Case studies from real n8n builds

A look inside workflows I've designed and shipped end-to-end — AI agents, Google Sheets, and live social platforms, all wired together.

Instagram · AI agent
01 / Lead response

Instagram DM auto-responder

A webhook-triggered AI agent reads incoming Instagram messages, pulls context from a Google Sheets memory, and sends a personalised reply automatically — no one has to watch the inbox.

WebhookAI AgentGoogle SheetsInstagram API
ATS · Résumé scoring
02 / Hiring

ATS résumé scoring automation

Reads resumes submitted through a form, extracts the text straight from the PDF, scores each candidate with AI, and routes the result into a tracking sheet and an email — hands-off screening from upload to inbox.

Google FormsPDF extractionAI scoringGmail
Instagram + Facebook · Publishing
03 / Content

Multi-platform content publisher

A scheduled AI agent decides whether each post is an image, carousel, or video, then publishes it to Instagram and Facebook directly from one content sheet.

Schedule triggerAI AgentInstagramFacebook Graph API
Telegram · RAG chatbot
04 / Support

Telegram RAG support agent

A retrieval-augmented chatbot that answers customer questions from live Google Sheets data, with conversation memory so follow-up questions stay in context.

Telegram TriggerGemini modelSimple memoryGoogle Sheets
Business problems I solve

If any of this sounds familiar, automation pays for itself fast.

01

Hours lost to manual posting

Your team manually uploads content to Instagram and Facebook every day instead of focusing on strategy.

02

Slow replies, lost leads

DMs and inquiries pile up unanswered for hours, and prospects move on to a faster competitor.

03

Disconnected tools

Sheets, email, and forms don't talk to each other, so someone has to copy data between them by hand.

04

Document overload

Screening resumes or documents manually eats up days that should go toward decisions, not data entry.

Workflow process

How a project goes from idea to live automation

Five steps, the same ones running quietly inside every workflow I ship.

Map the manual process

I sit with your current process — every click, copy-paste, and handoff — and find exactly where time is being lost.

Design the workflow

I architect the automation in n8n: triggers, AI agents, data sources, and the exact logic that should run without you.

Build & connect tools

I wire up Sheets, Gmail, Instagram, Facebook, Telegram, or whatever you use, with the right AI models and memory.

Test against real data

Every workflow runs against real scenarios before going live, so edge cases get caught before your customers see them.

Launch & monitor

I activate the workflow, hand over documentation, and stay on for monitoring and adjustments as your business changes.
